title: psoralea outrampsii
intro: Psoralea outrampsii is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a type of wild pea native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains isoflavones and coumarins, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, skin conditions, and cardiovascular issues. Herbal preparations of Psoralea outrampsii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and improve immune function.
